grid_dims_observed.note: Same grid dimension chain as printed on EE-03 (page58) -- upper floor plan is drawn with a dashed outline extending slightly beyond the ground-floor footprint on the ระเบียง/กันสาด side, but the structural 1/2/3 x-grid and E/D/C/B/A y-grid columns line up identically.

elements.description: Two downlights (⊕) near the top wall of นอน 2, labeled 'g' and 'f'; a 'g' mark repeats lower in the room near the doorway
Two downlights (⊕) labeled 'h' near the top wall of นอน 3
2-gang switch mark labeled 'f,g' at the doorway shared between นอน 2 and the hall/stair landing
Marks labeled 'd,e' clustered near the stair landing/hall, close to the '2/LP' circuit tag and an 'e' mark just above them near the 'ลง' (down/stairs) arrow
Downlight(s) labeled 'h'/'i' near the upstairs ห้องน้ำ, with a switch point at the doorway

Four downlights (⊕) labeled 'a' in นอน 1 (2 near the top wall, 2 lower near the exterior wall), plus one 'b' mark near the lower exterior corner; a 2-gang switch labeled 'a,b' sits at the room's doorway
Switch mark labeled 'c' near the ระเบียง (balcony) entrance at the bottom of the plan, on the same wall run as the stair landing

'2/LP' circuit tag near the stair landing marking the feed point for the upper-floor lighting circuit (circuit 2 of panel LP, per EE-02); an 'LP' text label also appears at the stair landing, most likely marking the vertical conduit riser location down to the ground-floor panel rather than a second physical panel

warnings: GRID: same as EE-03 (page58) -- a house-wide grid master (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json) appeared partway through this extraction batch (produced by a separate concurrent pass over this house's structural pages); this page's independently-read dimension chain matches the master's named grid (1,2,3 / E,D,C,B,A) and dummy grid (1' at -1.1m, 3' at 7.0m) exactly.

This sheet's dashed outer boundary line (slightly larger than the solid wall outline) represents the upper-floor overhang/eave line extending past the ground-floor footprint on the ระเบียง/กันสาด side -- labeled with an elevation callout '5/+3.65/3' (กันสาด, canopy) matching the same balcony/canopy elevation marker seen at the equivalent spot on the outlet plan (EE-06, page 61).

Room count matches the 3-bedroom-plus-bathroom upper floor confirmed on the mechanical M-02 sheet (page 63) and the structural room layout implied by the outlet plan EE-06 (page 60/61) -- นอน 1, นอน 2, นอน 3, and one shared ห้องน้ำ.

As with EE-03, individual single-letter switch-loop labels are genuinely difficult to resolve with full confidence at the available image resolution; several elements are flagged needs_human_review_zoom_required rather than asserted as certain.
This is the upper-floor counterpart to EE-03 (page58) -- together they cover this 2-story house's full lighting layout, unlike house #2's single-floor set which needed only one lighting-plan sheet.
